title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that turns any Ollama model into a drop-in LLM for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models, chats, documents, and multi-user access.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for chatting with Ollama models from the terminal; themes, keymaps, history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s UI and inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama, Chroma, and LangChain.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Declarative Ollama package and NixOS module; pin models and server config in your system flake.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming, dependency injection helpers, and Blazor sample.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack with Ollama, CUDA, WebUI, Nginx, and automatic HTTPS via Let’s Encrypt.

title: ollama-ansible
summary: Ansible role to install Ollama server, pull models, and configure systemd on Ubuntu/Debian/RHEL.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you run local LLM prompts inside notes using Ollama for summarization and brainstorming.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI micro-template exposing Ollama chat/completions endpoints compatible with OpenAI client libraries.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio, strongly-typed requests/responses, and SSE streaming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord.py bot that streams Ollama replies into Discord threads with slash commands.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Official registry of Modelfile definitions for Llama 3, Phi-3, CodeLlama, Mistral, Gemma, and more.
